name: INSIGHTS Consumer Contract
description: Outbound read dependency. INSIGHTS consumes immutable plan revision detail, exact Budget Position, and bounded dated actual members through one BUDGET-owned coherent evidence operation that cites the shared public LEDGER snapshot. INSIGHTS owns exact-window interpretation, signals, explanations, and durable Report Snapshots; it receives no plan mutation, private-storage, independent LEDGER cursor, or BUDGET calculation authority.
